slides.text: Mindfulness is paying attention to the present moment without judgment.
Sit comfortably with a straight spine, eyes closed or gazing softly.
Notice your breath, feeling it at your nostrils, chest, or belly.
When your mind wanders, gently return to your breath without judgment.

Practice mindfulness daily, even just 5 minutes,
to improve your well-being.

Regular practice reduces stress and improves
emotional regulation and focus.
